title: Lina's Create Fabric
description: This is a modpack focused primarily (entirely) on Create with some QoL and cosmetic additions. Based upon Fabulously Optimised.
body:
# Lina's Create Fabric

## Borked as of 0.2 due to Sodium incompatibility with Create

This is a personal modpack. It was created for myself and maybe some of my friends to comfortably play Create on my server.

As my main gaming machine is a fanless MacBook, optimisation is of utmost priority. This also means that some mods will be excluded because they don't run on my Mac.

This modpack is based on Fabulously Optimised with mods updated to latest version (at the time of modpack release).

## Changes compared to [Fabulously Optimised 5.3.3](https://github.com/Fabulously-Optimized/fabulously-optimized/blob/main/INCLUDED-MODS.md)

### Mods Added

#### Create (and add-ons)

- [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)
- [CC: Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked)
- [CC:C Bridge](https://modrinth.com/mod/cccbridge)
- ~~[Create: Crystal Clear](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-crystal-clear-fabric)~~ incompatible with 1.20
- [Create Crafts and Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition)

#### Decoration

- [Adorn](https://modrinth.com/mods?q=adorn)

#### World Generation

- [Fabric Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons)
- ~~[Fabric Seasons: Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons-extras)~~ incompatible with 1.20
- [Fabric Seasons: Terralith Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons-terralith-compat)
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)
- ~~[Treeplacer - Terralith Addon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/treeplacer-terralith-addon)~~ incompatible with 1.20

#### Player Interaction

- [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/emotecraft)
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)

#### QoL

- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky)
- [InventoryProfilesNext](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next)
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)
- [Jade Addons](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade-addons-fabric)
- [Mouse Wheelie](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-wheelie)
- [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli)
- [Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)


#### Libraries

- [Architectury](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
- [libIPN](https://modrinth.com/mod/libipn)

### Config Edits

- Changed `isxander-main-menu-credits.yml` to reflect the modpack.
